chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.S- 177 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on MA 582/2025. 3. For orders on MA 583/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 10.11.2025. None present on behalf of the petitioner. No intimation is received. From the perusal of file, it appears that none have been present on behalf of the petitioner on the last four dates of hearing (including today). Accordingly this petition is dismissed alongwith pending applications for want of prosecution/non-prosecution. JUDGE Tufail
